name: Priestess of the Ashened City
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>灰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>せし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>都</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みやこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>巫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If "Obsidim, the Ashened City" is in the Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Priestess of the Ashened City" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ashened" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Priestess of the Ashened City". You can only use this effect of "Priestess of the Ashened City" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If "Obsidim, the Ashened City" is in the Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Priestess of the Ashened City" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ashened" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Priestess of the Ashened City". You can only use this effect of "Priestess of the Ashened City" once per turn.
eff: If "Obsidim, the Ashened City" is in the Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Priestess of the Ashened City" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ashened" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Priestess of the Ashened City". You can only use this effect of "Priestess of the Ashened City" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
